name: Affine & Projective Varieties
description: V(I), Zariski topology. Hilbert Nullstellensatz: I(V(J))=√J. Affine vs projective space. Irreducible varieties. Coordinate ring.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Affine variety\nV(I) = zeros of I"]
    D2["Def: Zariski topol\nclosed = V(I)"]
    D3["Def: Projective space\nℙⁿ = kn+1∖0/~"]
    D4["Def: Irreducible\nV=V₁∪V₂⇒V=Vᵢ"]
    T1["Thm: Nullstellensatz\nI(V(J))=√J"]
    T2["Thm: V↔I bijection\nirred aff var ↔ prime"]
    T3["Thm: Coordinate ring\nΓV = k[x]/I(V)"]
    T4["Thm: dim V = tr deg\nof frac field"]
    T5["Thm: Projective variety\nhomog ideal V"]
    D1 --> D2
    D1 --> T1
    D2 --> D4
    D1 --> T2
    T2 --> T3
    T3 --> T4
    D3 --> T5
    T1 --> T2
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4,T5 theorem
